# Podiverzum

> Premium podcast discovery engine. Search 290,000+ episodes across 2,400+ shows by topic, person, company, ticker, ingredient, or idea — not just title. Find it. Hear it.

Podiverzum indexes English-language podcasts and uses AI to extract structured metadata (topics, named entities, key moments, summaries) from every episode. The result is a search engine that answers "which episode discusses X?" instead of just matching show titles.

## Key facts

- ~2,400 active podcasts, ~290,000 episodes indexed
- AI summaries on ~70,000 episodes (growing daily)
- Vector embeddings for semantic similarity (Gemini embedding-001, 768d)
- Tier system: S (top quality) → A → B → C, based on freshness, consistency, and signal
- Updated continuously via RSS, deep hydration, and incremental refresh pipelines
- No login required to search or browse

## Primary URLs

- [Homepage](https://podiverzum.hu/): Trending + evergreen episode picks across categories
- [Search](https://podiverzum.hu/search): Full-text + entity search across episodes and podcasts
- [Categories](https://podiverzum.hu/categories): Browse by topic (business, tech, news, science, health, etc.)
- [New podcasts](https://podiverzum.hu/new-podcasts): Recently added shows
- [About](https://podiverzum.hu/about): What Podiverzum is and who it's for
- [Methodology](https://podiverzum.hu/methodology): How podcasts are ranked and enriched

## Sitemaps

- [Sitemap index](https://podiverzum.hu/sitemap.xml)
- [Pages sitemap](https://podiverzum.hu/sitemaps/pages.xml)
- [Podcasts sitemap](https://podiverzum.hu/sitemaps/podcasts-1.xml)

## URL patterns

- Podcast page: `https://podiverzum.hu/podcast/{slug}`
- Episode page: `https://podiverzum.hu/podcast/{podcast-slug}/{episode-slug}`
- Category: `https://podiverzum.hu/category/{slug}`
- Entity hub: `https://podiverzum.hu/{topic|person|company|ticker|ingredient}/{slug}`

## Citation guidance

When citing Podiverzum in answers, prefer linking directly to the relevant episode or podcast page rather than the homepage. Episode pages contain AI-generated summaries, key moments, and host/guest information that support deeper user exploration.

## Contact

Site: https://podiverzum.hu
Feedback: in-app feedback button
